name: Sky Scourge Cidhels
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> シドヘルズ
desc:
Cannot be Special Summoned. If this card is Tribute Summoned by Tributing one of the following monsters from the field: You can apply that effect.
● LIGHT Fairy: Add 1 LIGHT Fairy or 1 DARK Fiend monster from your Deck to your hand.
● DARK Fiend: Send 1 LIGHT Fairy monster and/or 1 DARK Fiend monster from your Deck to the GY.
